articles.title: Wary allies show there's no quick fix to Trump's Iran crisis
articles.summary: European leaders are hesitant to help Trump secure the Strait of Hormuz, but they know inaction on the Iran war is not really an option.

articles.summary: Companies allowed more harmful content on user’s feeds, knowing their algorithms ran on outrage, BBC hears.

articles.summary: Citizens of the most violent-wracked provinces have been warned the government is "at war" with the gangs.
